query:
SELECT wc.id, wc.remoteJid, wc.status, wc.assignedUserId, ca.status as ca_status
FROM wa_conversations wc 
LEFT JOIN conversation_assignments ca ON ca.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND ca.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid AND ca.tenantId = wc.tenantId
WHERE wc.assignedUserId IS NOT NULL AND (wc.status = 'resolved' OR ca.status = 'resolved')
LIMIT 10;
